operational_knowledge_units.title: Geek+ RMS page visibility depends on firewall access
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The RMS slide states that the Geek+ RMS web page will be shown when appropriate firewall rules are open.
observed_evidence: Visible text: "This page will show the Geek+ RMS web page when appropriate firewall rules are open."
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Overall System RMS: the Geek+ RMS web page is available or shown when appropriate firewall rules are open. This is a UI access dependency tied to firewall configuration.

operational_knowledge_units.title: RMS page presents system faults and active AGV faults in separate screen regions
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that system faults appear on the left side of the RMS page and active AGV faults appear on the right side.
observed_evidence: Visible text: "I will also show system faults on the left and any active AGV faults on the right."

relationships.target: Active AGV faults on the right

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: On the RMS page, system faults are shown on the left side and active AGV faults are shown on the right side. This is a diagnostic UI layout concept for fault visibility.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Review RMS page fault areas
preconditions: Appropriate firewall rules are open, as stated on the slide.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes the RMS web page and identifies left-side system faults and right-side active AGV faults.

steps.instruction: Open or view the Geek+ RMS web page if appropriate firewall rules are open.
steps.expected_outcome: The RMS web page is visible.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the Geek+ RMS web page is displayed.

steps.instruction: Check the left side of the RMS page for system faults.
steps.expected_outcome: System faults, if present, are shown on the left.
steps.validation_check: Verify whether a system fault area is present on the left side.

steps.instruction: Check the right side of the RMS page for active AGV faults.
steps.expected_outcome: Active AGV faults, if present, are shown on the right.
steps.validation_check: Verify whether an active AGV fault area is present on the right side.

warnings: This candidate is based on descriptive slide text rather than a fully documented action sequence.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Navigation candidate for RMS review: if firewall rules permit access, view the Geek+ RMS web page, then review system faults on the left and active AGV faults on the right.
